notes.turf: THE actual field: 115 = GrdPSNormalBaseA root (64x64 green grass tile), 117 = NormalBaseC root (white I8 detail overlay). These live as standalone roots OUTSIDE map_head -- the transformation engine uploads them by symbol name, which is why pushing any map_head texture never recolored the field. Composite/tint these to retheme the turf
notes.center_emblem: 116 = GrdPSNormalBaseB root: the 256x256 Pokeball center circle - protected
notes.turf_pattern: the field luminance I4 sheets (18 + 46-49/52, alias GrdPStadiumBldK). Luminance/pattern detail only
notes.deck: the gray platform ring around the turf (grayscale sheets 0-4)
notes.walls: stadium wall/billboard sections (incl. the 288x256 olives 22-27, which are walls NOT deck)
notes.limitations: map_head 5-17 are the TRANSFORMATION bases/emblems (OVBase/OVF/OVG/OVHTP/OVN/OVR/OVW aliases) - not visible on the normal stage, leave alone. The jumbotron in-match text is SIS-rendered (engine text)
notes.method: mega-pack diff vs vanilla GrPs.usd (packs replace exactly NormalBaseA+B) + root-image alias dump, 2026-06-11. BASE IS GrPs.usd (NTSC English) - the .dat is the Japanese stage with a different texture story
